edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:56161ba9ca42
edges.original_sentence: Post hoc tests in the analysis of variance of five growth variables showed that vegetation significantly reduced red oak diameter and shoot biomass and increased specific leaf area (Table 3), while the protection treatment had no effect.

edges.original_sentence: Percentage of photosynthetic photon flux density (%PPFD) was lower under vegetation (23.1%) than on bare soil (88.3%) (F1,1.97 = 3066.28, p ≤ 0.05).
